senses.gloss: to lean, to rest, to support oneself
to be near, to be close to, to approach
to support firmly, to prop up (something)
a surface that rises from a base, face of a mountain, a wall
a support, a thing which one leans upon, to recline against
a support, a thing which one leans upon, to recline against; a cushion or pillow
a thing or person which one can rely on, a thing sturdy or not liable to move
backing, a means of being held up or supported
backing, a means of being held up or supported; the support for a hadith's validity; the chain of narrators on which its veracity rests
